scripts.dev: mkdir -p node_modules/.cache/learningai && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=node_modules/.cache/learningai/server.mjs && node node_modules/.cache/learningai/server.mjs
scripts.format:check: prettier --check AGENTS.md README.md TUTOR_ARCHITECTURE.md package.json server.ts src/views/AdminView.tsx src/views/RevisionView.tsx src/lib/brainRuntimeSettings.ts src/lib/chatAgentTools.ts src/lib/chatThreadUtils.ts src/lib/voiceAgentTools.ts src/memory/brain.context.ts src/memory/brain.rehearsal.ts src/memory/beta.diagnostics.ts src/memory/background.jobs.ts src/memory/correction.events.ts src/memory/answer.evidence.ts src/memory/longterm.memory.ts src/memory/memory.orchestrator.ts src/lib/tutorBook.json src/lib/userBrainArchitectureBook.ts src/lib/chapterAudioOverviews.ts src/lib/chapterAudioOverviews.json scripts/brain-postchange.mjs scripts/generate-user-brain-audio-overviews.mjs scripts/user-brain-audio-overview-plan.mjs server/web-search.ts tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.format: prettier --write AGENTS.md README.md TUTOR_ARCHITECTURE.md package.json server.ts src/views/AdminView.tsx src/views/RevisionView.tsx src/lib/brainRuntimeSettings.ts src/lib/chatAgentTools.ts src/lib/chatThreadUtils.ts src/lib/voiceAgentTools.ts src/memory/brain.context.ts src/memory/brain.rehearsal.ts src/memory/beta.diagnostics.ts src/memory/background.jobs.ts src/memory/correction.events.ts src/memory/answer.evidence.ts src/memory/longterm.memory.ts src/memory/memory.orchestrator.ts src/lib/tutorBook.json src/lib/userBrainArchitectureBook.ts src/lib/chapterAudioOverviews.ts src/lib/chapterAudioOverviews.json scripts/brain-postchange.mjs scripts/generate-user-brain-audio-overviews.mjs scripts/user-brain-audio-overview-plan.mjs server/web-search.ts tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.test: rm -rf .tmp-test && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/server.mjs && esbuild server/web-search.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/web-search.mjs && esbuild src/lib/chatAgentTools.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/chatAgentTools.mjs && esbuild src/lib/chatThreadUtils.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/chatThreadUtils.mjs && esbuild src/lib/voiceAgentTools.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/voiceAgentTools.mjs && esbuild src/memory/brain.context.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/brain.context.mjs && esbuild src/memory/brain.rehearsal.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/brain.rehearsal.mjs && esbuild src/memory/evidence.mastery.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/evidence.mastery.mjs && esbuild src/memory/evidence.ledger.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/evidence.ledger.mjs && esbuild src/memory/bkt.engine.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/bkt.engine.mjs && esbuild src/memory/answer.evidence.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/answer.evidence.mjs && esbuild src/memory/misconception.graph.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/misconception.graph.mjs && esbuild src/memory/tool.jobs.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/tool.jobs.mjs && esbuild src/memory/background.jobs.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/background.jobs.mjs && esbuild src/memory/model.runs.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/model.runs.mjs && esbuild src/memory/memory.events.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/memory.events.mjs && esbuild src/memory/retrieval.events.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/retrieval.events.mjs && esbuild src/memory/correction.events.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/correction.events.mjs && esbuild src/memory/artifact.records.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/artifact.records.mjs && esbuild src/memory/beta.diagnostics.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/beta.diagnostics.mjs && esbuild src/memory/revision.evidence.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/revision.evidence.mjs && esbuild src/memory/flashcard.concepts.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/flashcard.concepts.mjs && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
